data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: WhatsApp uses a microservices architecture to maximize scalability and flexibility.
data.technical_spec: Service-oriented architecture with APIs to allow seamless communication across services.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Fundamental to WhatsApp's architecture is its incorporation of end-to-end encryption for security.
data.technical_spec: Encryption protocol ensures that only the communicating users can read messages.

data.title: Cloud-based Infrastructure
data.description: WhatsApp operates on a distributed cloud-based platform for high availability and performance.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes cloud servers for distributed computing and data storage.

data.title: Real-time Messaging Protocol
data.description: Supporting instant communication, using protocols optimized for low latency.
data.technical_spec: Based on protocols like XMPP tailored for mobile optimization.

data.title: Cross-Platform Support
data.description: WhatsApp's architecture supports various operating systems ensuring wide accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes frameworks that allow seamless experiences on iOS, Android, and web platforms.
